name: python3-filelock
title: python3-filelock
description:
platform independent file locking module
This package contains a single module, which implements a platform independent
file locking mechanism for Python. The lock includes a lock counter and is
thread safe. This means, when locking the same lock object twice, it will not
block.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-filelock because platform independent file locking module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-filelock as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-filelock with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-filelock --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
